# Sub-Object Resonance

## I. DIAGNOSTIC SUMMARY
**Sub-Object Resonance** is the field of consequence generated by a dense [[the_sub_object]]. It is the shared "frequency" of social behavior that allows individuals to act in alignment without central coordination. It is the material substrate of what is colloquially called "culture" or "spirit."

## II. TECHNICAL MECHANICS
1.  **Behavioral Bending**: Resonance acts like a gravitational field. It makes certain behaviors "easier" (carrying the weight for a neighbor) and others "harder" (stealing from the group) by standardizing the expectation of consequence.
2.  **Field Threshold**: Resonance only appears when labor-trust surpasses a critical density. Below this threshold, behavior is isolated; above it, behavior becomes synchronous (Apostolic Motion).
3.  **Capture and Inversion**: When a field is captured by [[gmorknicity]], the resonance is "hollowed out"—the symbols still pulse, but the frequency has been adjusted to extract labor rather than amplify it.

## III. SURVIVAL "WHY"
For the early social species, resonance enabled the transition from *reflexive* survival (fleeing as individuals) to *coordinated* survival (holding the line as a group). It is the "software" that runs on the hardware of the tribal bond.

## IV. CONNECTIONS
*   **Source**: [[the_sub_object]].
*   **Fuel**: [[moral_labor]], [[trust_as_commodity]].
*   **Outcome**: [[social_synchronization_engine]].
*   **Biblical Anchor**: Pentecost—the sudden synchronous resonance of a scattered group around the trauma-memory of the Resurrection, enabling a new global metabolic protocol.
